title: InteractiveStuff
body:
![InteractiveStuff Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ab489f8dab3af46a9c23385703e17b978e47423.png)

The First-Person Item Interactions Mod!

[![Discord Server](https://img.shields.io/discord/1444791753529102428?style=for-the-badge&logo=Discord&logoColor=white&label=Discord&color=728ADA)](https://discord.gg/8Ap2gGaKbw) [![YouTube Channel Subscribers](https://img.shields.io/youtube/channel/subscribers/UCrS774u0xB1JvgphM3HRbWg?style=for-the-badge&logo=youtube&logoColor=white&label=Youtube&color=FF0034)](https://www.youtube.com/@omardotcontent) [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1405017?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white&label=curseforge&color=F16436)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/interactivestuff) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/interactivestuff?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&label=Modrinth&color=1CD96A)](https://modrinth.com/mod/interactivestuff) [![GitHub followers](https://img.shields.io/github/followers/omardotcontent?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&label=Github)](https://github.com/omardotcontent)
![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e984962684598311a8697c7ffc65bf79e2d6ede_0.webp) InteractiveStuff is a client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft **1.21.10+** that adds immersive, interactive behaviors to items and blocks in first-person view — think animated held items, reactive note blocks, sculk sensors, lanterns, and much more. First-person mode is strongly recommended for the best experience. ### [Vyn](https://github.com/Abdelaziz1586/Vyn) Support InteractiveStuff integrates Vyn that lets resource pack creators script item rendering and behavior in any way they want, with no Java required. --- ![Important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d00f8ef6f1c482fbc5e2e46d7c68f293b5d3b683_0.webp)
---
